OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-14-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Lanita R. Hopkins is present.
Attorney Andres Sanchez appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Karlene Anita Hines is present.
Attorney Cecilia Ziniti representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of DEC-19-2011 is vacated.
